title: YMCA gym — Eva tries soccer for the first time
prompt: Wide indoor shot in @ymca-gym — polished blonde-wood gym floor with painted court lines (red dots, green dots, black). Bright fluorescent overhead light. @Eva already mid-floor on the LEFT-CENTER with a white-and-black soccer ball at her feet, dribbling awkwardly, tongue poking out in concentration. @Sara already on the RIGHT-FOREGROUND, arms crossed, watching with one skeptical eyebrow raised. Eva (tongue out, focused, whispering to herself): "...okay... easy easy easy..." Sara (deadpan, dry): "Dribbling. That IS a foot skill." Eva winds up, kicks — the ball rolls only two feet then stops. Eva (recovering, hands on hips): "I'm WARMING UP."
